description: This Java class, JwtService, handles creation and validation of JWT access tokens within an authentication module. It generates tokens with user claims and verifies incoming tokens, ensuring proper issuer and signature validation.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service class responsible for issuing and verifying JWT tokens, managing token claims and security.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a signed JWT for the given user, embedding user ID, email, and roles with an expiration based on configured TTL.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Parses a JWT token string and validates its signature and issuer, returning the token claims.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts user UUID from the token claims' subject field.
